result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 7: WHERE c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp AND c.closedda...
                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: SELECT c.id as case_id, c.createddate, c.closeddate,
       COUNT(ch.*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment') as owner_assignment_count,
       array_agg(DISTINCT trim(both ' ' from regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', ''))) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL) as owners_history,
       trim(both ' ' from regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '')) as case_ownerid
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT c.id as case_id, c.createddate, c.closeddate,
       COUNT(ch.*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment') as owner_assignment_count,
       array_agg(DISTINCT trim(both ' ' from regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', ''))) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL) as owners_history,
       trim(both ' ' from regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '')) as case_ownerid
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT c.id as case_id, c.createddate, c.closeddate,
       COUNT(ch.*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment') as owner_assignment_count,
       array_agg(DISTINCT trim(both ' ' from regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', ''))) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL) as owners_history,
       trim(both ' ' from regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '')) as case_ownerid
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid;

args.query:
SELECT c.id as case_id,
       trim(both ' ' from c.createddate) as createddate_str,
       trim(both ' ' from c.closeddate) as closeddate_str,
       COUNT(ch.*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment') as owner_assignment_count,
       array_agg(DISTINCT trim(both ' ' from regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', ''))) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL) as owners_history,
       trim(both ' ' from regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '')) as case_ownerid
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE trim(both ' ' from c.closeddate)::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp AND trim(both ' ' from c.closeddate)::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT c.id as case_id,
       trim(both ' ' from c.createddate) as createddate_str,
       trim(both ' ' from c.closeddate) as closeddate_str,
       COUNT(ch.*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment') as owner_assignment_count,
       array_agg(DISTINCT trim(both ' ' from regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', ''))) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL) as owners_history,
       trim(both ' ' from regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '')) as case_ownerid
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE trim(both ' ' from c.closeddate)::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp AND trim(both ' ' from c.closeddate)::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid;
